Speaker: LPC
Text: But, yeah.

Speaker: LPC
Text: I don't think she's going to answer.

Speaker: Woman
Text: Hello.

Speaker: LPC
Text: Hi... hi, how's it going?

Speaker: Woman
Text: Who you can talk to?

Speaker: LPC
Text: Harold... Sacks.

Speaker: Woman
Text: Well, who's this, please?

Speaker: LPC
Text: My name is, uh... Brock.

Speaker: Woman
Text: Brock, who?

Speaker: LPC
Text: Brock Winthrop.

Speaker: Woman
Text: Well, I don't know who you want.

Speaker: LPC
Text: Well, I'm calling from, uh, Guam right now.

Speaker: Woman
Text: From Guam?

Speaker: LPC
Text: For Harold Sacks.

Speaker: LPC
Text: I am, and I don't know what time it is there, so you'll help to forgive me.

Speaker: LPC
Text: I thought it was about 9 o'clock in the evening.

Speaker: LPC
Text: But I'd like to talk about him.

Speaker: Woman
Text: Well, go ahead.

Speaker: LPC
Text: It is my belief, and I intend to maintain this belief, that Harold Sachs above all stood for freedom.

Speaker: LPC
Text: I would like to add also that

Speaker: LPC
Text: people usually speak of Harold Sachs with a reverent tone.

Speaker: LPC
Text: One of admiration.

Speaker: LPC
Text: That's really all I've got to offer on that.

Speaker: LPC
Text: I just am more interested in what you have to say.

Speaker: Woman
Text: I have nothing to say.

Speaker: LPC
Text: Huh?

Speaker: Woman
Text: I have nothing to say.

Speaker: Woman
Text: How about what?

Speaker: Woman
Text: I don't know what you're talking about.

Speaker: Woman
Text: I think you're had too much to drink or something.

Speaker: Woman
Text: Harold...

Speaker: Man
Text: Yeah, Harold Sacks, I think, will take plastic.

Speaker: Woman
Text: What?

Speaker: LPC
Text: Why don't you just... can you answer a couple of questions for me?

Speaker: Woman
Text: Well, what do you want to know?

Speaker: LPC
Text: Where is Harold Sachs?

Speaker: LPC
Text: Where is Harry Sachs?

Speaker: Woman
Text: Well, there's no Harry Sacks here, or Harold Sacks.

Speaker: Man
Text: I heard he sacked the 49ers pretty good.

Speaker: Woman
Text: Pardon?

Speaker: LPC
Text: H... how... what do you know, what can you tell me about Harry Sacks?

Speaker: Woman
Text: I don't know anything about Harry Sacks.

Speaker: Woman
Text: I think you've got a problem.

Speaker: LPC
Text: Listen, all I did was I called zero zero for the new toll-free

Speaker: LPC
Text: savings? And this is what happened.

Speaker: Woman
Text: Well, then you've got the wrong number.

Speaker: LPC
Text: I'm just after the savings, you know?
